name: Polar Coordinates
description: Describing positions using distance and angle from a central point (center, not axes).

content.overview: Instead of 'go right 3 units, up 4 units,' you say 'go 5 units in the direction 53 degrees.' That's polar! Distance + angle = position. {{viz:diagram-01}}
keyPoints: Polar = position using (r, θ) where r is distance, θ is angle
Can convert between Cartesian and polar
content.whyItMatters: Circular motion, orbits, rotations—all easier in polar. Some physics problems become simple in polar that are complicated in Cartesian.
